hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
attraction_type_set=set()
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='attraction': attraction_type_set.add(attraction_type(activity, target_city(plan)))
result=not({"Other", "natural scenery"}&attraction_type_set)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
intercity_transport_go=''
intercity_transport_back=''
if allactivities(plan)[0]['type'] == "train" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[0])==start_city(plan) and allactivities(plan)[-1]['type'] == "train" and intercity_transport_origin(allactivities(plan)[-1])==target_city(plan):
  result=True
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language:
We are a group of 5, departing from Nanjing to Beijing for a 2-day trip. The itinerary must satisfy at least one of the following:  
1. Do not want to visit Other and natural scenery.  
2. Want to take a train to the destination and take a train back.
